description: The keychron helper function and keyboard definitions are duplicated across darwin-modules/policy/laptop.nix, darwin-modules/policy/desktop.nix, and darwin-modules/apps/karabiner.nix. Vendor ID 13364 is hardcoded in 3 places. Extract to a shared keyboard registry module (e.g., darwin-modules/hardware/keyboards.nix) that policy and app modules can reference.
title: Extract shared keychron keyboard definitions
